title: Sokolov Capital Hit With Sectoral Sanctions
body: OFAC today designated Russian financial-services firm Sokolov Capital under Executive Order 13662, citing the bank's role in Russia's financial-services sector. Sokolov Capital's founder and majority shareholder, Aleksei Sokolov, was simultaneously added to the SDN list. According to filings, Sokolov Capital also holds a 15% minority stake in Iron Mountain Holdings, a Delaware vehicle previously identified in connection with the Petrov network. Treasury officials said the designation reflects ongoing efforts to constrain the Russian financial sector.
